info.name: Fraud Rule Engine API
info.description:
Comprehensive API test collection for the Fraud Rule Engine.

**New Features Covered:**
- Weighted risk scoring (each rule/check has a configurable weight, capped at 100)
- New rule condition types: BETWEEN, REGEX, STARTS_WITH, ENDS_WITH, CONTAINS
- Built-in fraud checks: Cross-Border, Self-Transfer, High-Value Amount, Off-Hours
- Duplicate transaction detection
- Pagination with max page size cap (100)

**Security Modes:**
- **No Security (default):** All requests work without authentication
- **Secure Mode:** Set `auth_enabled` to `true` and use Basic Auth credentials

**RBAC Roles:**
- `admin/admin` → ROLE_ADMIN (full access: CRUD rules + fraud data)
- `analyst/analyst` → ROLE_ANALYST (read fraud data + submit transactions, no rule management)

item.name: Normal Transaction - No Fraud (ZAR, low amount, business hours)
Self-Transfer Check - Same Account and Beneficiary
Multiple Rules - USD + High Amount + Off-Hours + Cross-Border
Get Flagged Items - Large Size Capped at 100
Get Fraud Items for Known Account
Get Fraud Items for Unknown Account (Empty)
